{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Shi Lindon Arelius
| aliases = Lindon Arelius
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Path of Black Flame]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[black dragon madra]], [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Blackflame]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, [[Sage of Twin Stars]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Void Sage]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Arelius branch family, Blackflame Empire vassal state, [[Akura clan]], prime Akura team}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] Arelius is a powerful [[sacred artist]] who has ascended through various ranks, progressing from an [[Underlord]] to an [[Archlord]] and eventually becoming a [[Sage]]. Originally from the [[Blackflame territory]], he was adopted into the [[Arelius family]] and received significant training and resources from an [[Arelius Underlord]], [[Eithan]] Arelius. His combat abilities involve the [[Path of Black Flame]] and a fire and destruction [[Path]] inherited from the former [[Imperial family]]. Throughout his journey, he has been associated with several major entities, including the [[Akura clan]] and the [[Wei clan]], where he was born. [[Lindon]] has achieved notable status as an [[Uncrowned King]] and the [[Sage of Twin Stars]], and he has been involved in significant conflicts, including battles against [[Abidan]] and the [[Silent King]]. He is also recognized for his connection to the [[Phoenix]], Suriel, and has served as a representative of the [[Reaper Division]].}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] wears a white sacred artist's robe.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] follows the [[Path of Black Flame]] and is eighteen years old.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s full name is [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The young man challenged [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is an adopted member of an Arelius branch family and a member of the [[Blackflame Empire]] vassal state.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is of the [[Akura clan]] and a chosen of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is chosen of [[Akura Malice]] and representative of the prime [[Akura]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Selected by [[Charity]] for the tournament, [[Lindon]] Arelius successfully advanced to the top sixteen. As a [[pure madra]] [[Underlord]], he possesses black dragon madra that feels like a flame with an endless hunger. While located in the fortress with [[Seishen Daji]], he is referred to as the [[Blackflame]]. During his travels, he utilizes a green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] for flight.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is [[Charity]]'s selection for the tournament and reached the top sixteen.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s full name is [[Lindon]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is a [[pure madra]] [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] Arelius is in the fortress with [[Seishen Daji]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] Arelius possesses black dragon madra.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] Arelius's black dragon madra feels like a flame with an endless hunger.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] Arelius is referred to as the [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] Arelius uses a green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] to fly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] Arelius is a character in the story.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] wears the clothes of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] Arelius is a potential hostage to force [[Yerin]] Arelius's cooperation.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] addresses [[Lindon]] as [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is the [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] was a [[sacred artist]] who was corrupted by the power of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] Arelius is described as a lynchpin.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] blazes with [[Northstrider]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Herald]] offered to send the group safely to [[Lindon]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Void Sage]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]], Wei Shi [[Lindon]] Arelius possesses distinct physical traits including black-and-white eyes and one hand that is whiter than the other. During his exploits, he managed to nearly destroy the entity known as [[Crusher]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Crusher]] was nearly destroyed by [[Lindon]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] Arelius is a [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] Arelius is a [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] Arelius has black-and-white eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] Arelius has one hand whiter than the other.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] is of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Wei Shi Lindon Arelius, I challenge you,” the young man said.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|"Gratitude," the Blackflame said to Meira.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"Have a seat, Wei Shi Lindon Arelius," Reigan Shen called.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“By the authority of the Akura clan, let it be known that the sacred artist formerly known as Wei Shi Lindon Arelius has been corrupted by the power of the Silent King,” she announced.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I am willing to send you safely to Lindon Arelius if you agree to leave me and the Sage unharmed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
